Sec. 1  
Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major city in Nigeria, known for its economic growth and cultural diversity. It is one of the largest cities in the country and serves as a hub for business and education. The city is also home to several important institutions, including the University of Lagos and the Lagos State Government. Lekki is a place where people from different backgrounds come together, contributing to the city's vibrant atmosphere.
